mapper.select: SELECT id, period_num AS periodNum, prize_pool AS prizePool, carryover, status, draw_time AS drawTime, grand_number AS grandNumber, first_number AS firstNumber, grand_winner_id AS grandWinnerId, first_winner_id AS firstWinnerId, grand_prize AS grandPrize, first_prize AS firstPrize FROM cornucopia_period WHERE status = 0 AND server_id = #{serverId} ORDER BY draw_time ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, period_num AS periodNum, prize_pool AS prizePool, carryover, status, draw_time AS drawTime, grand_number AS grandNumber, first_number AS firstNumber, grand_winner_id AS grandWinnerId, first_winner_id AS firstWinnerId, grand_prize AS grandPrize, first_prize AS firstPrize FROM cornucopia_period WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, period_num AS periodNum, prize_pool AS prizePool, carryover, status, draw_time AS drawTime, grand_number AS grandNumber, first_number AS firstNumber, grand_winner_id AS grandWinnerId, first_winner_id AS firstWinnerId, grand_prize AS grandPrize, first_prize AS firstPrize FROM cornucopia_period WHERE status = 1 AND server_id = #{serverId} ORDER BY draw_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cornucopia_period (period_num, draw_time, carryover, prize_pool, status, server_id) VALUES (#{periodNum}, #{drawTime}, #{carryover}, #{carryover}, 0, #{serverId})
mapper.update: UPDATE cornucopia_period SET prize_pool = prize_pool + #{amount} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cornucopia_ticket WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND period_id = #{periodId}
SELECT id, ticket_number AS ticketNumber, purchased_at AS purchasedAt FROM cornucopia_ticket WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND period_id = #{periodId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cornucopia_ticket (user_id, period_id, ticket_number) VALUES (#{userId}, #{periodId}, #{ticketNumber})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, ticket_number AS ticketNumber FROM cornucopia_ticket WHERE period_id = #{periodId}
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, draw_date AS drawDate, draw_count AS drawCount, free_used AS freeUsed FROM cornucopia_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND draw_date = #{drawDate}
SELECT IFNULL(draw_count, 0) FROM cornucopia_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND draw_date = #{drawDate}
